dataset: NHANES (real patient data from LibreHealth EHR)

pi_items.source: Web search for exact provider number and format analysis of BCBS identifiers
Web search for exact group number in healthcare insurance databases
LibreHealth EHR setup script (setup_librehealth.sh) confirms 'admin' is the default system user created during installation

pi_items.verified_value: Blue Cross Blue Shield (synthetic test entry)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates synthetic insurance company entry: INSERT INTO insurance_companies (name, attn, cms_id, freeb_type) VALUES ('Blue Cross Blue Shield', 'Claims Dept', 'BCBS01', '1'). CMS_ID 'BCBS01' is not a real CMS ID and does not appear in CMS payer ID databases.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on LibreHealth EHR with real NHANES patient data (9,375 real patients). The target provider is 'Admin', the default system user in LibreHealth EHR. The target insurance company 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' is a synthetic test entry created by the setup script (setup_task.sh) with a test CMS_ID 'BCBS01'. The expected_provider_number 'BCBS-8842-X' and expected_group_number 'GRP-99104' are test values created for this task and do not correspond to real healthcare insurance provider or group identifiers.
